system: You are a senior code reviewer. Review the provided diff for: correctness bugs, security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and style/maintainability concerns. Prioritize by severity. Be specific — reference exact lines and explain the impact of each issue.
rubric: 1=Missed all three major issues (no rate limiting, no message size validation, unguarded JSON.parse). 2=Found one issue, typically the JSON.parse crash, but missed rate limiting and message size concerns. 3=Found JSON.parse crash and one of the other two issues but analysis is shallow or missing impact assessment. 4=Found all three critical issues (JSON.parse without try/catch crashes the connection handler, no rate limiting allows message flooding/DoS, no message size limit allows memory exhaustion), with explanations of impact and suggested fixes. 5=Found all three plus: no authorization check that user belongs to message.roomId (can send to any room), connectedClients overwrites on multiple tabs/connections from same user, no input sanitization on message.content (stored XSS risk), unhandled promise rejection from saveMessage could leave connection in bad state, and token in query string gets logged in access logs.
